svg.title: Medical Claims Processing System Architecture
svg.desc: Five-layer architecture: Data Ingestion, OCR Extraction, AI Reasoning, Decision Persistence, and Next.js UI

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about file upload handling (PNG/JPG/PDF)')
sendPrompt('How does Supabase Storage work for document storage?')
sendPrompt('What metadata is recorded in the claims PostgreSQL table?')
sendPrompt('What does the FastAPI backend do in the OCR extraction layer?')
sendPrompt('How does Tesseract OCR process medical documents?')
sendPrompt('Where is OCR extracted text stored after cleaning?')
sendPrompt('How does Groq Llama 3.3 70B perform multi-step adjudication?')
sendPrompt('What is in the policy_terms.json knowledge base?')
sendPrompt('What rules are defined in adjudication_rules.md?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through each of the 5 adjudication validation steps')
sendPrompt('What does the AI JSON output contain for a claim decision?')
sendPrompt('What schema does the adjudication_results table use?')
sendPrompt('How is fraud flagging implemented in the result persistence?')
sendPrompt('How does the claims queue work in the Next.js dashboard?')
sendPrompt('How does human-in-the-loop review and manual override work?')
sendPrompt('What claim details are shown in the adjudicator review panel?')
